minting_now.description:

2222 isn’t just a number - it’s an exclusive crew for those who understand the true vibe: greasy burgers, loud bass, bright colors, and

minting_now.name: BoizDaRemix
minting_now.description: 8888 Boiz are Generated by Vibe coding, On chain Art for Fun

minting_now.name: Asteroid Shiba Club
minting_now.description: Elon Musk has shared videos of Asteroid Shiba multiple times. Liv, the designer of Asteroid Shiba, even attended one of Musk’s talks, participating in a live Q&A session—making #Asteroid the first meme coin to directly engage with Elon!

minting_now.name: crimecanvas
minting_now.description:
Japanese artist Crime Canvas's debut work has been released as his first NFT art piece
New works will be announced periodically

minting_now.name: Boardwalk Club
minting_now.description: Boardwalk Club collection has 800 limited edition NFTs. Beach Club has 720 while the rarer Founders Club has 80. Boardwalk Club collection is designed as a digital tool for active participants in the Boardwalk ecosystem.

minting_now.name: Lil Dickbutts
minting_now.description:
Made for degens.
Keep away from children.

minting_now.name: Collectr
minting_now.description:
Monthly Art on Base - Discover our stunning editions published monthly to bring awareness to the global community. With crosschain accessibility and credit card support, we make it easy for anyone to begin their own global art collecting journey.

Created with love by [Kusari](https://kusari.org).

minting_now.name: Mutants On Base
minting_now.description: Mutants On Base | MAPE is an exclusive NFT collection featuring 3,333 uniquely designed digital apes, hosted on the Ape blockchain. Created by NightRare Labs, the team behind the successful collection BABC and BBKC,AOB. Mutants aims to bring fresh energy to the NFT space with its distinctive style a

minting_now.name: Based Doodle Punks
minting_now.description: 2222 Doodle Punks encapsulates the essence of spontaneous and imaginative doodling, an art form that resonates with creativity and authenticity.

minting_now.name: MONBIS GENESIS
minting_now.description: Monbis is a 3D digital artwork featuring a three-eyed monster mascot with a minimalist, modern, and toy-like aesthetic. This design is highly suitable for use as an app icon, profile picture (PFP), or character design for collectible toys (blind box toys).

minting_now.name: Harso #1
minting_now.description: my photo is harsoyus from the 80s

minting_now.name: 305-02-Compass Points
minting_now.description:
Title: Guidelines 
Definition: A set of principles or direction used to navigate and make decisions in life.
Concept Overview
This collection explores the intricate balance between individuality and connection. It is a visual journey of finding one’s way while resonating with the world around us.

upcoming.name: Puzzle Jigsaw mask
upcoming.description: A collection dedicated to John Kramer, the master of puzzles and riddles. Movie characters combined with a mask from the Saw film. For collectors and beyond. A nod to creative thought. A little suspense never hurt anyone... ;))

upcoming.name: XTremX
upcoming.description:
XtremX — 5555 NFTs.

A dark, high-energy universe built for early ones.

Each piece represents a unique character from a corrupted dimension.

Most will watch. Few will act 👁️

upcoming.name: "Faces" by Michael Hafftka

upcoming.description:
